claims.claim: Industry compute build is roughly 10-15 GW this year, growing ~3x to 30-40 GW next year, ~100 GW in 2028, ~300 GW in 2029, at ~$10-15B per gigawatt.
claims.speaker: Dario Amodei
claims.comparison_note: Implies industry-wide capex of $100-225B in 2025 from gigawatt build, vs ledger total 2025 capex of $330B.

triangulation.derivation: Source says industry builds 10-15 GW in 2025 at $10-15B/GW. Implied capex = 10-15 GW × $10-15B = $100B to $225B. Ledger 2025 total capex = $330B (mag7 $250B + neoclouds $45B + sovereign $20B + enterprise $15B). Source figure is lower because gigawatts measures power capacity, not total capex (which includes non-power-build spend). Delta: -$105B to -$230B.

claims.source_excerpt:

claims.dedup_note: Implies industry-wide capex of $100-225B in 2025 from gigawatt build, vs ledger total 2025 capex of $330B.

claims.claim: Industry will reach multiple trillions of dollars per year in compute spend by 2028 or 2029 (3x growth path: 100 GW in 2028, 300 GW in 2029 at ~$10-15B/GW).
claims.speaker: Dario Amodei
claims.comparison_note: Forward projection implies ~10x ledger's 2025 total capex ($330B) by 2029.

triangulation.derivation: Source: 100 GW in 2028 × ~$12.5B = $1.25T; 300 GW in 2029 × ~$12.5B = $3.75T. Ledger 2025 total = $330B. Implied 2028 capex is ~3.8x 2025 level; 2029 is ~11x. Confirms aggressive 3x/yr industry trajectory but well above ledger's current 22.7% YoY growth pace.

claims.dedup_note: Forward projection implies ~10x ledger's 2025 total capex ($330B) by 2029.

claims.claim: Industry revenue is expected to be in the low hundreds of billions by 2028, with trillions by 2030 in slow-diffusion case.
claims.speaker: Dario Amodei
claims.comparison_note: Implies massive expansion vs 2025 customer revenue of $19.7B gross.

triangulation.derivation: Source says 'low hundreds of billions' by 2028 and 'trillions' by 2030. Ledger 2025 customer revenue (gross) = $19.7B; OpenAI 2030 ARR projection in ledger = $280B. Source aligns with ledger's OpenAI 2030 trajectory if industry totals ~$500B-$1T by 2030 (OpenAI ~30-50% share).

claims.dedup_note: Implies massive expansion vs 2025 customer revenue of $19.7B gross.
